name: piexif (Python EXIF Read/Write Library)

performance.notes: Pure Python; fast for tag read/write operations

agent_readiness.notes: Read and write EXIF data in JPEG/TIFF/WebP images. import piexif. exif_dict = piexif.load('photo.jpg'). gps = exif_dict['GPS']. ifd = exif_dict['0th']. exif = exif_dict['Exif']. Modify: exif_dict['0th'][piexif.ImageIFD.Make] = b'Canon'. exif_bytes = piexif.dump(exif_dict). piexif.insert(exif_bytes, 'photo.jpg'). piexif.remove('photo.jpg'). piexif.transplant('source.jpg', 'dest.jpg'). Tags: piexif.ImageIFD, piexif.ExifIFD, piexif.GPSIFD. Works with Pillow: image.save('out.jpg', exif=exif_bytes). Copy EXIF between images. Privacy: use piexif.remove() to strip metadata.

gotchas: Tag values must be correct types (bytes, int, tuple) — no automatic conversion
GPS coordinates stored as IFDRational tuples — conversion needed
Some exotic EXIF tags may not be recognized
exifread is better for read-only use (more battle-tested)
Pillow 9+ changed EXIF handling — ensure compatibility
best_when: Modifying EXIF metadata in JPEG/TIFF images with Pillow
Programmatic GPS coordinate embedding in photos
avoid_when: Non-JPEG formats (some formats have limited support)
When Pillow's built-in EXIF methods suffice
summary: piexif reads/writes EXIF metadata in JPEG/TIFF/WebP. import piexif; exif = piexif.load('photo.jpg'); exif['0th'][piexif.ImageIFD.Make] = b'Canon'; piexif.insert(piexif.dump(exif), 'photo.jpg'). piexif.remove('photo.jpg') to strip. piexif.transplant(src, dst). MIT. Works with Pillow. Tag values need correct types. Best for EXIF modification and privacy stripping. Use exifread for read-only.
